---
title: "REPL-based Long-context Reasoning"
date: 2026-06-28
status: WIP
encrypted: true
summary: "Reproducing and extending Recursive Language Models (RLM) — offloading long contexts into a REPL — plus an iterative (ILM) and runtime-assisted DP-ILM variant. Evaluated on OOLONG, LongBench v2, and CodeQA with DeepSeek v3.2 and Kimi K2."
payload: 
---
